title: ranunculus philonotis var. parvulus
intro: Ranunculus philonotis var. parvulus, also known as Alpine Buttercup, is a rare and delicate plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The Alpine Buttercup has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial for wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection. Alpine Buttercup can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
